scripts.planning:verify: corepack pnpm planning:check && corepack pnpm planning:test
scripts.security:verify: corepack pnpm --filter @gitpm/security build && vitest run packages/security/src/security-boundary.test.ts && node scripts/security-spike-report.mjs
scripts.verify: corepack pnpm clean && corepack pnpm build && corepack pnpm lint && corepack pnpm typecheck && corepack pnpm test && corepack pnpm smoke && corepack pnpm schema:verify && node scripts/security-spike-report.mjs && corepack pnpm planning:verify
